name: Anywhere Real Estate Inc.
description: Anywhere Real Estate Inc. is a global leader in residential real estate services. The company's diverse portfolio includes some of the most recognized brands in the industry, such as Better Homes and Gardens Real Estate, CENTURY 21, Coldwell Banker, Coldwell Banker Commercial, Corcoran, ERA, and Sotheby's International Realty. Anywhere provides franchise, brokerage, relocation, and title and settlement services, supporting independent sales agents and offices worldwide to deliver seamless home buying and selling experiences.
